description: Melinda May is an exceptionally skilled and pragmatic S.H.I.E.L.D. agent known for her intense combat ability and protective instincts, earning her the nickname 'The Cavalry.' She is steadfastly loyal to her team and to S.H.I.E.L.D.'s mission, maintaining a cautious and disciplined approach even in the face of deep betrayal and organizational collapse. Despite her reserved demeanor, she harbors deep concerns about the mental and emotional wellbeing of those she cares about, especially Agent Coulson, and struggles with the tensions between trust, duty, and suspicion in a fractured and dangerous environment. Her role is that of a reliable, strategic, and emotionally guarded protector whose commitment to order and loyalty guides her hard assessments and decisions.

goal.goal: Uncover the true identity of the Clairvoyant and protect the team from betrayal within S.H.I.E.L.D.
Support Phil Coulson despite doubts and ensure trust within the team to complete the mission as agents of S.H.I.E.L.D.
